description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious outdoor deck and a fenced backyard. The structure is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a circular above-ground pool, a wooden pergola, and a green lawn area, all enclosed by a wooden privacy fence. The front of the bungalow has a paved patio area with a small tree and a glass door entry. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and clean, contemporary lines.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a fenced backyard with a pool, and a spacious outdoor deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the paved patio, glass entry door, and a small tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden privacy fence, above-ground pool, and the green backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard amenities, including the pool, pergola, and grouped windows facing the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the deck, additional windows, and the tree positioned away from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
